channel.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jun 21st, 2022
item.description:
Custom Integrations

  • The Watchmanstars148 - Keep track of missing entities and services in your config files.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jun 16th, 2022
item.description:
Custom Integrations

  • Spotcaststars440 - Start Spotify playback on an idle Chromecast device as well as control Spotify connect devices.
  • Sonoff LANstars1.8k - Control Sonoff devices with eWeLink (original) firmware over LAN and/or Cloud.

    • Dashboards

    Icon packs

  • simpleiconsstars79 - Use the free icons from the simpleicons set.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jun 15th, 2022
item.description:
In case you need help

Other Communities

  • 🇳🇱 Dutch Domotics Discord - Dutch Discord server with home automation enthusiasts.

    • Add-ons

    Third Party Add-ons

  • CrowdSecstars18 - A next-gen collaborative IPS/IDS to protect you from intrusion.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jun 14th, 2022
item.description:
Custom Integrations

  • WebRTC Camerastars679 - View RTSP streams from IP Cameras in real-time through WebRTC or MSE with Pan/Zoom controls.

    • Dashboards

    Alternative Dashboards

  • Dwains Dashboardstars1.2k - An fully auto-generating dashboard for desktop, tablet and mobile.

    • Dashboards

    Icon packs

  • Hass Hue Iconsstars183 - Additional Philips Hue bulbs and fixtures icons.

    • Add-ons

    Third Party Add-ons

  • JupyterLabstars38 - Create documents containing live code, equations, visualizations, and explanatory text.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jun 13th, 2022
item.description:
Public Configurations

  • Klaas Schoutestars134 - Hass.io based, Intel NUC, Ubuntu Server, Docker and regularly updated.

    • Dashboards

    Custom Cards

  • Card Modderstars557 - Style your Lovelace cards.
  • Vacuum Map Cardstars932 - This card provides a user-friendly way to fully control Xiaomi (Roborock/Viomi/Dreame/Roidmi) and Neato (+ possibly other) vacuums.
  • Raspberry Pi Status Cardstars94 - Show status of your Raspberry Pis.
  • Atomic Calendar Revivestars212 - Calendar card with advanced settings.

    • Custom Integrations

  • HACS - This is a manager for your custom integration (components) and plugin (lovelace elements) needs.
  • Xiaomi Cloud Map Extractorstars809 - Presents a live view of a map for Xiaomi (Roborock/Viomi/Roidmi/Dreame) vacuums without a need for rooting.

    • DIY

  • Tasmotastars18.5k - Firmware for ESP8266 boards and devices.

    • Installing

  • Home Assistant Installation - The official installation guides.
  • Compare Installation Methods - The available installation methods compared.

    • Add-ons

    Third Party Add-ons

  • EmonCMSstars7 - A powerful open-source web app for processing, logging, and visualizing energy, temperature, and other environmental data.

    • Online Resources

    YouTube Channels

  • Home Assistant - Official YouTube Channel where new launches and live streams are held.
  • Everything Smart Home - Focuses on Smart Home, Home Automation, general tech reviews, guides, and step-by-step DIY projects.

    • Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-selfhostedstars105.8k - Curated list of awesome self hosted software.

    • Dashboards

  • Dashboards Documentation - The official documentation.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jun 12th, 2022
item.description:
Dashboards

Custom Cards

  • Vacuum Cardstars608 - A card to card for controlling a vacuum cleaner robot.
  • Purifier Cardstars163 - A card for controlling air purifiers.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Jul 15th, 2021
item.description:
Uncategorized

  • Home Assistant Taskbar Menustars264 - A client for Windows that can display Lovelace views, control entities and show persistent notifications.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Dec 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Dashboards

Themes

  • 📺 Themes Tutorial - Quick tutorial/example on how to configure themes.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Nov 30th, 2020
item.description:
Dashboards

Custom Cards

  • Thermostat Cardstars671 - Thermostat control card that looks like a Nest Thermostat.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Nov 24th, 2020
item.description:
Online Resources

YouTube Channels

  • Smart Home Junkie - How-to videos and tutorials for starters and advanced users.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Nov 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Uncategorized

  • rhasspystars1.2k - Toolkit for developing custom voice assistants.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Oct 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Dashboards

Custom Cards

  • Big Number Cardstars91 - Display big numbers for sensors, including severity level as background.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Oct 6th, 2020
item.description:
Dashboards

Custom Cards

  • Restriction Cardstars161 - A card to provide restrictions on Lovelace cards defined within.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Oct 1st, 2020
item.description:
Uncategorized

  • AppDaemonstars685 - AppDaemon is a loosely coupled, multi-threaded, sandboxed Python execution environment for writing automation apps.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 29th, 2020
item.description:
Add-ons

Third Party Add-ons

  • AppDaemonstars84 - Python Apps and HADashboard.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Add-ons

Official Add-ons

  • DuckDNS - Updates your Duck DNS IP address and generate SSL using Let's Encrypt.
  • File editor - Browser-based configuration file editor.
  • Mosquitto - Fast and reliable MQTT broker.
  • Terminal & SSH - Allows logging in remotely to using a web terminal or SSH client.
  • Samba - Access your configuration files using Windows network shares.
  • NGINX SSL proxy - Reverse proxy with SSL termination.
  • deCONZ - Control a ZigBee network using ConBee or RaspBee hardware by Dresden Elektronik.
  • TellStick - Run a TellStick and TellStick Duo service.
  • Ada - Ada is voice assistant powered by Almond which is open and privacy-preserving.
  • Almond - The Open, Privacy-Preserving Virtual Assistant.
  • HomeMatic - HomeMatic central based on OCCU.
  • Let's Encrypt - Get a free SSL certificate from Let's Encrypt; an open and automated certificate authority (CA).
  • MariaDB - An open source relational database (fork of MySQL).

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 25th, 2020
item.description:
In case you need help

Other Communities

  • Home Assistant Community Add-ons Discord - Get support on the Home Assistant Community Add-ons.

    • In case you need help

    Official Communities

  • Home Assistant Facebook Group - Facebook group for enthusiasts.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 24th, 2020
item.description:
Dashboards

Custom Cards

  • LG WebOS Remote Controlstars242 - Remote Control for LG TV WebOS.
  • Auto-Entities Cardstars708 - Dynamically adds entities: 🔮 Magic.
  • Animated Weather Cardstars341 - Nice looking card showing the weather, with subtle animations.

    • DIY

    DIY Projects

  • QuinLED - DIY Wi-Fi LED dimmers and controllers using ESP32 boards.

    • Public Configurations

  • Andrea Iannuccistars61 - Also known as SeLLeRoNe. Regularly updated.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Nov 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Dashboards

Custom Cards

  • RGB Light Cardstars319 - Colorful buttons to control your RGB Lights.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Online Resources

YouTube Channels

  • BeardedTinker - Tutorials & 3D printing.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Oct 28th, 2019
item.description:
Dashboards

Themes

  • Google Home Themestars105 - Two themes (light and dark) matching the design of Google Home Hub.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Oct 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Dashboards

Themes

  • Synthwavestars133 - A theme influenced by the cover artwork of modern Synthwave bands.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 30th, 2019
item.description:
Dashboards

Themes

  • Slatestars86 - A dark theme close to the vanila looks from seangreen2.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 27th, 2019
item.description:
DIY

DIY Projects

  • RaspiPoolstars302 - A cost-effective, easy-to-build, easy-to-use "Swimming-Pool Automation System".

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 25th, 2019
item.description:
In case you need help

Official Communities

  • Home Assistant Discord - Join the chat, most of us are there.
  • Home Assistant Community - The discussion forum, also used for feature requests.
  • Home Assistant Subreddit - If you are into Reddit, subscribe.

    • In case you need help

    Other Communities

  • Dr. ZZs - Facebook group by Dr. Zzs.
  • ESPHome Discord - Get support for your DIY ESPHome project.

    • Public Configurations

  • Carlo Costanzostars4.1k - Probably the most documented configuration out there.
  • DubhAdstars446 - Also known as Tinkerer shares his configuration files.
  • geekofweekstars1.1k - Has over 300+ automations.
  • Mahasri Kalavalastars193 - Impressive setup, with lots of different hardware working together.
  • Alok Saboostars1.6k - Also known as arsaboo. Regularly updated.
  • Aaron Bachstars253 - Also known as bachya. Regularly updated and includes numerous Dockerized services.
  • Franck Nijhofstars1.5k - Hass.io based, very different configuration structure compared to others.

    • Add-ons

    Third Party Add-ons

  • SSH & Web Terminalstars194 - SSH and Web-based terminal with tons of pre-loaded useful tools.
  • UniFi Controllerstars182 - The UniFi Controller allows you to manage your UniFi network using a web browser.
  • Node-REDstars347 - Flow-based programming for the Internet of Things.
  • Plex Media Serverstars95 - Your recorded media beautifully organized and ready to stream.
  • IDEstars61 - Advanced web-based IDE, based on Cloud9 IDE.
  • Dasshiostars164 - Easily use your Amazon Dash Buttons.
  • InfluxDBstars114 - Scalable datastore for metrics, events, and real-time analytics.
  • Grafanastars157 - Open platform for beautiful analytics and monitoring.
  • Torstars39 - Protect your privacy and access your instance via Tor.
  • Spotify Connectstars108 - Spotify Connect client for playing music on your Home Assistant device.
  • zigbee2mqttstars558 - Zigbee to MQTT bridge, get rid of your proprietary Zigbee bridges.
  • TasmoAdminstars188 - Centrally manage all your Sonoff-Tasmota devices.
  • Aircaststars219 - AirPlay capabilities for your Chromecast players.
  • AirSonosstars57 - AirPlay capabilities for your Sonos players.
  • Dropbox Syncstars106 - Upload your backup snapshots to Dropbox.
  • Log Viewerstars35 - Browser-based live log viewing utility.
  • Tautullistars34 - Monitor and get statistics from your Plex server.
  • motionEyestars199 - Simple, elegant and feature-rich CCTV/NVR for your cameras.
  • Backup to Google Drivestars86 - Backup snapshots to Google Drive.
  • Glancesstars86 - A cross-platform system monitoring tool written in Python.
  • Matrixstars47 - A secure and decentralized communication platform.
  • AdGuard Homestars255 - A network-wide ad-and-tracker blocking DNS server with parental control.
  • Traccarstars74 - Traccar is modern GPS Tracking Platform.
  • Home Panelstars171 - A touch-compatible web frontend for controlling the home.
  • Hass.io Google Drive Backupstars2.1k - A complete and easy to configure solution for backing up your snapshots to Google Drive.
  • Grocystars187 - ERP beyond your fridge! A groceries & household management solution for your home.

    • Dashboards

  • 📺 Getting started with Lovelace UI - Great introduction to Lovelace UI by DrZzs.
  • Share the Love - Custom card demos and configuration examples for Lovelace.
  • 📺 How to set up Lovelace - Excellent step by step video for beginners by JuanMTech.

    • Dashboards

    Icon packs

  • Font Awesome Iconsstars185 - Use the free icons from Font Awesome in your frontend.

    • Dashboards

    Themes

  • Midnight - A dark theme by Marcel Hoffs.
  • Dark Cyan - A dark theme with cyan accents by Ryoen Deprouw.
  • Grey Night - A dark theme with grey accents by ksya.
  • Dark Red - A dark theme with red accents by Ryoen Deprouw.
  • Halloween - Pumpkins colored by Mahasri Kalavala.
  • Black and Green - A dark theme with pale green accents by GreenTurtwig.
  • Vintage - Give your frontend a vintage look with this theme by Anup Surendran.
  • Carbon Green - Light carbon theme with green accents by Reua.
  • Many Themes, One Repostars190 - 13 Themes in a convenient ZIP file.

    • Dashboards

    Custom Cards

  • Canvas Gauge Cardstars110 - Use awesome gauges from canvas-gauges.com.
  • Mini Media Playerstars1.2k - A minimalistic media player card.
  • Mini Graph Cardstars2.1k - A minimalistic sensor graph card.
  • Button cardstars1.2k - Button card for your entities.
  • Slider Entity Rowstars666 - Add a slider to adjust, e.g., the brightness of lights in lovelace entity cards.
  • Power Wheel Cardstars140 - An intuitive way to represent the power that your home is consuming or producing.
  • Simple Thermostatstars577 - A simpler and more flexible thermostat card.
  • Bar Cardstars253 - Customizable animated bar card.
  • forked-daapd Cardstars74 - Control a forked daapd instance.
  • Dual Gauge Cardstars119 - Shows two gauges in one.
  • Xiaomi Vacuum Cardstars215 - Detailed card for Xiaomi vacuum cleaners (and others).
  • Simple Weather Cardstars199 - A minimalistic weather card, inspired by Google Material Design.
  • Home Cardstars155 - A quick glance of the state of your home.
  • Banner Cardstars486 - A fluffy linkable banner with interactive glances to spice up your home dashboards.
  • Spotify Cardstars266 - List and select from current available devices and users top playlists on Spotify.
  • Battery Entitystars171 - Displaying battery levels for battery entities.
  • Multiple Entity Rowstars529 - Show multiple entity states or attributes on entity rows.
  • Home Feed Cardstars178 - Display a combination of persistent notifications, calendar events, and entities in the style of a feed.
  • Config Template Cardstars278 - Allow using templates in Lovelace.

    • Dashboards

    Alternative Dashboards

  • TileBoardstars1.5k - A simple yet highly configurable Dashboard.

    • Custom Integrations

  • Lutron Caseta Prostars178 - Integrates Lutron Caseta Smart Bridge PRO / RA2 Select.
  • SmartIRstars1.3k - Integrates devices using Broadlink IR.
  • Xiaomi Hygrothermostars83 - Sensor platform for Xiaomi Mijia BT Hygrothermo temperature and humidity sensor.
  • Volkswagen Carnetstars185 - Integrates Volkswagen Carnet (requires valid Carnet subscription).
  • Untappdstars34 - Connects with your Untappd account.
  • Elasticsearchstars101 - Publishes events to Elasticsearch.
  • Alexa Media Playerstars946 - Allow control of Amazon Alexa devices.
  • iCloud3stars290 - Improved version of the iCloud device tracker component with a lot of capabilities.
  • Circadian Lightingstars536 - Circadian Lighting slowly synchronizes your color changing lights with the regular naturally occuring color temperature of the sky throughout the day.
  • HASS Aarlostars267 - Asynchronous Arlo integration. Similar to the Arlo web site; monitors events and states for all base stations, cameras and doorbells.

    • DIY

  • ESPHome - Program ESP8266 boards and ESP32 boards using YAML.
  • Magic Cardsstars474 - RFID scannable cards that you can program to do anything.

    • DIY

    DIY Gateways

  • OpenMQTTGatewaystars2.7k - A flexible MQTT gateway for IR, RF, BLE, MiFlora, SMS, and many sensors.
  • esp8266 Milight Hubstars816 - Alternative hub for Milight/LimitlessLED devices that uses MQTT.
  • zigbee2mqttstars8.6k - Zigbee to MQTT bridge, get rid of your proprietary Zigbee bridges.

    • DIY

    DIY Projects

  • HA SwitchPlate - LCD Touchscreen wall switch replacement.
  • 📺 DIY Multisensor - $15, Temperature, Humidity, Light, Motion, and RGB LED, without soldering.
  • $10 WiFi RGB Bulb - In inexpensive RGB bulb that works on WiFi.
  • 433mhz/IR Bidirectional Gateway - Bidirectional with IR and 433mhz using ESP8266 and MQTT.
  • esp8266MQTTBlinds - Automate your window blinds using an ESP8266, a servo and MQTT.
  • Home Assistant's Hackster.io - A Hackster channel with multiple DIY projects.
  • ESP MQTT Digital LEDsstars513 - WS2811 LED Stripe for the JSON Light Component from BRUH.
  • Bed Presence Detection - ESP8266 based Bed Presence Detection.
  • NFC Scannerstars55 - Build an NFC tag/card scanner with an ESP8266, PN532 and MQTT.
  • ESP32-Cam Facebox - Tie a ESP32-CAM, HA, and Facebox together for a cheap Facial Recog / Home monitoring solution.

    • Online Resources

    Blogs

  • DIY Futurism - Brad posts articles with great instructions for new users.
  • Phil Hawthorne - Co-host of the Home Assistant Podcast.
  • Smart Home Hobby - Features budget friendly guides and information.
  • Self Hosted Home - Articles on DIY home automation projects and self hosted services.
  • Tinkering with Home Automation - Tinkerer's blog and guides.
  • HomeTechHacker - DIY Smarthome guides, reviews, and advice.
  • Intermittent Technology - Quindor's personal blog for pasting random (mostly technology related) things.

    • Online Resources

    YouTube Channels

  • BRUH - Ben has great tutorials for getting started, unfortunately, inactive lately.
  • BurnsHA - Great informational and tutorial videos.
  • DrZzs - Great how-to videos and also streams live.
  • The Hook Up - Tutorials and more, also has videos on home automation in general.
  • HASSCASTS - Tips, Tricks & Tutorials, moving to mainly live streams.
  • JuanMTech - Easy to follow how-to videos, product reviews and more.
  • vCloudInfo - Publishes videos based on his home and GitHub repository.
  • digiblurDIY - Tutorials on hardware projects and Tasmota automations.
  • Intermit.Tech - Tutorials & reviews: Camera's, Home Networking, ESP8266 boards, Node-RED.

    • Online Resources

    Podcasts

  • Home Assistant Podcast - Biweekly podcast with the latest news and interesting guests.

    • Online Resources

    Twitter

  • @home_assistant - Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
  • @hass_devs - Latest news on the development of Home Assistant for contributors.
  • @balloob - Founder of the Home Assistant project.
  • @pvizeli - Core developer and creator of the Hass.io project.
  • @frenck - Creator of this Awesome list and maintainer of the Community Hass.io Add-ons project.
  • @ccostan - Blogger of all things Tech. Smart Home, #IOT & other Geeky subjects.
  • @HomeTechHacker - Guy friends call when #tech happens. Tweet 25-50x/week about #smarthome, #homenetwork, #cybersecurity, #Linux, #gadgets, and #life.
  • @hassioaddons - For all commmunity add-on news and updates.
  • @Dr_Zzs - Great how-to videos and also streams live.

    • Uncategorized

  • Room Assistantstars1.1k - A companion client to handle sensors in multiple rooms.
  • Home Assistant Companion - iPhone/iPad/iOS App to control and monitor your home remotely.
  • Mi Flora via MQTT daemonstars532 - Collect and transfer Xiaomi Mi Flora plant sensor data via MQTT.
  • hassctlstars79 - Simple command line utility to help debug your configuration.
  • Fully Kiosk Browser - Highly configurable Android Kiosk Browser and App Launcher.
  • Developer Documentation - The official developer documentation.
  • HASS Configuratorstars259 - Browser-based configuration file editor.
  • HA-Dockermonstars214 - A Node.js service for RESTful switches to control Docker containers.
  • Python Amazon Dashstars765 - Hack your Amazon Dash to run what you want. Without welders.
  • homekit2mqttstars315 - HomeKit to MQTT bridge.
  • Home Assistant Device Database - Database of supported/confirmed working devices.
  • Jinja Scripts for Curious Minds - Bunch of Jinja2 scripts helping you to understand it better.
  • Ariela - Freemium Android client application with widget support.
  • Gitlab CI/CD - How to simplify your smart home configuration with GitLab CI/CD.
  • Monitorstars1.4k - Distributed advertisement-based BTLE presence detection reported via MQTT.
  • HASS-data-detectivestars144 - Explore and analyse your database data.
  • ADB Intents - List of ADB intents to control Android Devices.
  • Home Assistant Config Helper for VSCode - Visual Studio Code Extension that provides auto-completion, config validation and snippets when editting your configuration.

    • Alternative Home Automation Software

  • openHAB - Java-based and aims at being a universal integration platform.
  • Domoticzstars3.2k - A lightweight Home Automation System.
  • Gladysstars2.2k - Open source program which runs on your Raspberry Pi.
  • SmartThings - Commercial home automation hub by Samsung.

    • Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-smarthomestars366 - Curated list of awesome SmartHome/Home Automation things.
  • awesome-iotstars2.6k - Curated list of awesome Internet of Things projects and resources.
  • awesome-open-iotstars537 - Curated list of open source IoT frameworks, libraries and software.
  • awesome-amazon-alexastars520 - Curated list of awesome resources for the Amazon Alexa platform.
  • awesome-mqttstars1.8k - Curated list of MQTT related stuff.

item.title: frenck/awesome-home-assistant Sep 7th, 2018
item.description:
How to use

  • Simply press command/ctrl + F to search for a keyword
  • Go through our Contents list
  • Alternatively, use the search on our website: https://www.awesome-ha.com
